title: Grilled Plantain Skewers with German Style BBQ Sauce
description: A twist on traditional German BBQ with the addition of grilled plantain skewers, perfect for a summer evening.

ingredients.name: Juicy Sausages
ingredients.notes: preferably German style sausages like bratwurst

instructions: Preheat the grill to medium-high heat.
Thread plantains, sausages, and onions onto skewers, leaving space between each piece.
Brush the BBQ sauce onto the skewers and season with salt and pepper.
Grill the skewers for 10-12 minutes, turning occasionally, until the plantains are caramelized and the sausages are cooked through.
Remove from heat and let rest for 5 minutes.
Serve hot with additional BBQ sauce on the side.
